title: Apple to soon let you unlock and start Tata car directly from your iPhone or Apple Watch: Report
snippet: Apple plans to add support car key features for Tata EV vehicles, according to a new report. The feature allows users to unlock and start their cars via iPhone or Apple Watch.&nbsp;

title: WhatsApp Plus is coming: Meta confirms new subscription, price leaked in new report
snippet: Meta is testing WhatsApp Plus subscription. The new premium tier will allow users to set custom app icons, ringtones, and expand chat features. The subscription is currently &nbsp;available to beta testers on Android with plans for iOS likely to follow soon.

title: I integrated Google Gemini into my daily workflow and saw real productivity gains
snippet: From email drafts to task management, I integrated Google Gemini into my daily workflow to test if it actually saves time. Here’s what worked, what didn’t, and whether it’s worth making AI part of your routine.

title: OnePlus Nord CE 6, Nord CE 6 Lite India launch date confirmed, battery, chipset and display details revealed
snippet: OnePlus has confirmed that the Nord CE 6 and Nord CE 6 Lite will debut in India on 7 May at 12noon. The Oppo sub-brand has also confirmed many key specs of the two devices

title: How to reverse-engineer the perfect ChatGPT prompt, according to an MIT professor
snippet: Andrew Lo, director of MIT’s Laboratory for Financial Engineering, recently revealed some key tips to get the best results out of your AI models like ChatGPT, Gemini and Claude.

title: Has Apple already begun marketing Siri's big overhaul? Check hidden AI clues in WWDC 2026 poster
snippet: Apple will unveil iOS 27 at WWDC 2026 in June. Ahead of the event, a new report suggests that the company's WWDC teaser shares hints at the major Siri overhaul planned in June.

title: Vercel data leak: CEO confirms internal breach linked to AI tool as hackers claim to sell stolen data for $2 million
snippet: Vercel has confirmed a data breach affecting its internal systems and attributed it to employee's Google Workspace account linked to an AI tool.

title: Fintech CTO slams Anthropic over mass Claude suspensions, warns developers ‘never put all your eggs in one basket’
snippet: Anthropic suspended over 60 Claude AI accounts for Belo, a fintech startup. Belo CTO Pato Molina criticized the lack of explanation from the company, and said there was only a Google form for an appeal process. After over 15 hours, Anthropic restored access, citing a false positive.

title: iPhone 18 Pro Max launching soon: New Cherry colour variant, price, processor and expected upgrades

title: Vibe coding gets a big reality check

title: Foreign betting sites pull a prank on taxman
